introSection: Force One Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Kid City Jurrasic Adventure in Tangerang, West Java, Indonesia.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and cyan supports. The ride originally opened with brown track and supports.

fullText:
Force One Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Kid City Jurrasic Adventure in Tangerang, West Java, Indonesia.



Yellow track and cyan supports. The ride originally opened with brown track and supports.
